prompt: Create a hyper-realistic photo of the uploaded person in their exact current pose, outfit, and environment from the uploaded photo. Keep the uploaded person's exact face, hair, skin tone, outfit, body proportions and all physical features fully preserved and unchanged — replicate everything exactly as seen in the uploaded image. Around the full-size realistic subject, place 5 tiny mini chibi cartoon versions of the same person — each mini chibi must share the same face, hairstyle, outfit, and overall look as the uploaded person but rendered in a cute 3D mini chibi doll style with big expressive eyes and small body. All 5 chibi versions must be exactly the same small size. One chibi is sitting on top of the subject's head, calm and unbothered. The remaining 4 chibi versions are placed naturally around the scene, each doing a different playful action that fits organically with the environment and objects visible in the uploaded photo — they interact with whatever is around them in a fun, spontaneous way. The full-size subject is photorealistic and the chibi versions are stylized 3D cartoon, creating a fun contrast. Match the exact lighting, background, and atmosphere of the uploaded photo. Ultra-detailed, cinematic, 8K resolution. Every chibi version wears the same outfit and shoes as the uploaded person. ABSOLUTE RULE: every single chibi must have exactly 2 legs, exactly 2 arms, exactly 2 hands — count every limb before finalizing. Any chibi with 3 or more legs is incorrect.
